title: Rockaankuthu Song Lyrics Premam
stanzas:
Paattonnu paada porenda
aadaama irukka mudiyaadhu da
oorellaam visilu parakkudhada
idhu kuththaattam
rockkaatam nee kelu da (2)

rockkuna anga weightu da
kuththuna inga geththu da
rendume kalandhaa
maasu da
say dorey me fa
solate do

rockku kuththu serndhu
vandhaa rockkaan kuthu
idhuthaan daa (2)

ulakora kuthunaa
rockku daa
namma ooru rockkuna
kuththu da

naayar kada chaayaa
nee kudichi paaru paiyaa
ye vella aara soda
adhu peru coacacola

hey thousand watts bulbu
adhu eriya theva power-u
ada kuraiku paar dogu
ada namaku mela godu

aetrikku poti vendaandaa
ellaame onnu isaithaandaa
nan sollum karuthum
idhuthaan daa
say sare gama padha nesa

rockku kuththu serndhu
vandhaa rockkaan kuthu
idhuthaan daa (2)

hey mass kuthu
hey weight kuthu
hey rendaa kuthu
idhu rockkaankuthe

seo.title: Rockaankuthu Song Lyrics Premam

seo.keywords: Pradeep Paalar, Premam, Rajesh Murugesan, Anirudh, Rockaankuthu full lyrics, Premam songs lyrics, Rockaankuthu lyrics snippets, Rockaankuthu WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Rockaankuthu lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Rockaankuthu?

The song Rockaankuthu celebrates the joy and energy of youth, encouraging listeners to embrace life and have fun.

How does Rockaankuthu fit into the plot of Premam?

In Premam, Rockaankuthu serves as a lively backdrop to the characters' carefree moments, highlighting their youthful spirit.

Who is the singer of Rockaankuthu?

The song is sung by the talented Anirudh, known for his energetic performances and catchy tunes.

Who composed the music for Rockaankuthu?

The music for Rockaankuthu was composed by Rajesh Murugesan, who is celebrated for his engaging soundtracks.

When was Rockaankuthu released?

Rockaankuthu was released on May 29, 2015, as part of the Premam soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Rockaankuthu from Premam is a lively celebration of youth and joy, perfectly encapsulating the carefree spirit of the characters. With its infectious beats and catchy lyrics, it invites listeners to dance and revel in the moment. The vibrant energy of Anirudh's voice, paired with Rajesh Murugesan's dynamic composition, creates an atmosphere of pure fun. This track not only enhances the film's narrative but also resonates with anyone looking to enjoy life to the fullest.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rockaankuthu from Premam is a vibrant anthem that captures the essence of youthful exuberance. Anirudh's electrifying vocals combined with Rajesh Murugesan's catchy composition make this track an instant favorite. Get ready to groove as the beats and lyrics come together to create an unforgettable musical experience!
stanzaMeanings: This song is about how you can't just sing any song; the whole place is buzzing with this dance and rock vibe, listen to it.
When the rock beats come together, it creates a powerful sound, both are combined to make a big impact, just say it like I do.
When the rock beats come together, this is what we call the rock dance.
If the world dances to the rock, then our town is also dancing to this rock beat.
Listening to Jackson's song and growing up with Raja's song.
Look at the shade of the shop, boy, what a drink it is, it's called Coca-Cola.
Hey, with a thousand-watt bulb, it needs power, look at the dog, it’s on top of us.
You don't need to worry about anything, everything is united in this song, this is what I say, just say the notes together.
When the rock beats come together, this is what we call the rock dance.
Hey, mass dance, hey, heavy dance, hey, double dance, this is the rock dance.
